bibliographic_info.title: Evaluation of the Ionospheric Corrections Generated by Smartphones with Different Real-Time Products

grounding_quotes: Usingasingle-referencePrecisePoint PositioningReal-TimeKinematic(PPP-RTK)framework,ionosphericdelaysareestimated from smartphone data and evaluated using real-time correction products from BeiDou PPP-B2b and Centre National d’Études Spatiales (CNES).

Additionally, thehorizontalpositioningperformancedemonstratesthatthepositioningperformanceof theusersmartphonewithionosphericcorrectionsbroadcastfromthebasesmartphoneis significantlyimproved,with74.7%and54.9%forCNESandPPP-B2bproductscompared with the conventional PPP solution.
